meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] 「X」にルビ is a ruby-presence editorial note — a proofreading marker that the run X carries a ruby gloss (the gloss text is NOT in the directive, so this is not renderable ruby). Whole body matches 「X」にルビ; classified as editorial kind ruby-attached. Bracket-only: the preceding 親 is left in place (consumes only the ［＃…］), so §8 renders 親 once followed by a compact <sup class="aozora-ruby-note">ルビ</sup> marker — NOT X, which would double-render. Serialize re-emits the raw bracket byte-exact. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor.
